mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tuyen_duong ORDER BY ma DESC
SELECT * FROM tuyen_duong WHERE 1=1 AND diem_di LIKE CONCAT('%', #{diemDi}, '%') AND diem_den LIKE CONCAT('%', #{diemDen}, '%') ORDER BY ma DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tuyen_duong (diem_di, diem_den, khoang_cach_km, thoi_gian_uoc_tinh_phut, hoat_dong) VALUES (#{diemDi}, #{diemDen}, #{khoangCachKm}, #{thoiGianUocTinhPhut}, #{hoatDong})
